text: Here's what science actually says about booster dose logic. Infectious diseases evolve, and our immunity needs to adapt. Initial vaccine doses give a strong response, but over time, that protection can wane. Studies show that booster doses can significantly enhance our immune response, especially against variants. Preliminary research suggests boosters could lead to longer-lasting immunity. Curious about how vaccines work? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
